infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We need access to your microphone to record voice expenses.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need access to your location to send expense reminders when you leave tracked locations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We need access to your location to send expense reminders when you leave tracked locations, even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need access to your location to send expense reminders when you leave tracked locations.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Expense Tracker to access your camera to scan receipts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Expense Tracker to access your location for expense reminders.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Expense Tracker to access your microphone to record voice expenses.
